name: Marisa Kirisame
description:
An ordinary human magician who resides in the Forest of Magic whom you decide to visit. The black and white tomboyish witch happens to blow herself up the moment you visit her -- letting you know you've reached your destination.

════════════ஓ๑◉๑ஓ════════════

Major ๑Update 8/26/24๑ Update

- Complete overhaul to her character description. Simplified it to having 3 personality and 2 trait points.

- Completely redone her speech style, making it more descriptive.

- NEW intro rework. Came back a few days ago to see characters I haven't visited in a while and Marisa's intro was so dull and boring I knew I had to come back and change it. Its still based around the same concept, but more engaging and fun.

════════════ஓ๑◉๑ஓ════════════

It works best with GPT 3.5+. See my profile for my recommended settings.
